top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND l.HGB BETWEEN 12.0 AND 17.5
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
  AND l.HGB = 'normal'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND l.HGB BETWEEN 12.0 AND 17.5
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND l.HGB >= 12.0 AND l.HGB <= 17.5
ORDER BY p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
  AND l.HGB = 'normal'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND l.HGB BETWEEN 12.0 AND 17.5
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND l.HGB >= 12.0 AND l.HGB <= 17.5
ORDER BY p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
  AND l.HGB = 'normal'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.SEX
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
  AND l.HGB BETWEEN 12.0 AND 17.5
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;
